prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低位次依次为约12316名、13401名、12792名、12095名、13436名，近五年呈波动走势，2025年基准位次约13436名，较2024年明显后移约1341名；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为5人，2024–2025年增至6人；2026年计划大幅扩招至23人，较2025年增加17人、增幅约283%，扩招力度极大，将显著拉低录取门槛，推动位次数字大幅增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 辽宁大学为国家211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第125名，近年排名稳定在120–130区间，属中游211层次；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现重大舆情事件；抖音学校热度排名第105位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量偏低；无投档断档或录取异常记录，报考心理层面无明显扰动；第五轮学科评估中，应用经济学获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；招生专业中金融学类、经济学类、国际经济与贸易等均属应用经济学一级学科范畴，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，电子信息/通信类为高热推荐，电气工程及其自动化高热推荐，法学推荐，汉语言/中文推荐，金融/财经/经济分化观望；该校招生专业覆盖金融学类、法学、汉语言文学、电子信息类等，整体专业热度中等偏上。本省2026年高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增加约19466人、增幅约29.7%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年招生计划大幅扩招（6→23人，+283%）、本省考生总数显著增加（+29.7%）、学校声誉平稳、专业热度中等偏上等因素，扩招效应远大于考生增加效应，整体录取门槛显著降低。以，考虑考生规模扩大带来的竞争加剧效应，微调后预测最低位次约36077名，区间35577–36577名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学（2026年新增）
- 金融学类（含金融学、保险学）
- 汉语言文学
- 经济学类（含经济学、国民经济管理，2026年新增）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 国际政治
- 国际经济与贸易（2026年新增）
- 国际经贸规则（2026年新增）
- 纪检监察（2026年新增）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 电子信息科学与技术
- 通信工程
- 数学与应用数学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年辽宁大学在北京市综合类大幅扩招至23人，录取位次预计后移至约36077名，报考难度较2025年显著降低。位次在预测区间35577–36577名内的考生可重点以二档专业为主、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<35577名）可重点冲击法学、金融学类等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（约36577名）建议以三档电子信息类、数学类专业为主，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Beijing comprehensive subjects were approximately 12316, 13401, 12792, 12095, and 13436 respectively, showing a fluctuating trend over the past five years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 13436, which is significantly shifted backward by about 1341 places compared to 2024. The enrollment plan for this university in Beijing comprehensive subjects was 5 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 6 students in 2024–2025. In 2026, the plan drastically expands to 23 students, an increase of 17 students or about 283% compared to 2025. This substantial expansion will significantly lower the admission threshold, causing a large increase in ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 125th, with recent rankings stable in the 120–130 range, placing it in the mid-tier 211 level. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no major public opinion incidents. Its Douyin school popularity ranking is 105th, rated as 'average', with relatively low short video exposure. There are no records of admission interruptions or abnormal enrollment, and no significant psychological disturbances in the application process. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university. Among the enrollment majors, Finance, Economics, and International Economics and Trade all fall under the first-level discipline of Applied Economics, which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that Electronics/Communication majors are highly recommended, Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended, Law is recommended, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, and Finance/Economics is divided with a wait-and-see attitude. The university's enrollment majors cover Finance, Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Electronics, etc., with overall major popularity at a medium-to-high level. The total number of registered candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in this province is about 84,900, an increase of about 19,466 or about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, indicating a significant expansion in the candidate pool and intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (6→23 students, +283%), the notable increase in the number of candidates in the province (+29.7%), stable university reputation, and medium-to-high major popularity, the expansion effect far outweighs the candidate increase effect, leading to a significant lowering of the overall admission threshold. Therefore, after adjusting for the intensified competition effect due to the expanded candidate pool, the predicted minimum ranking is about 36,077, with a range of 35,577–36,577.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law (New in 2026)
- Finance (including Finance, Insurance)
- Chinese Language and Literature
- Economics (including Economics, National Economic Management, New in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- International Politics
- International Economics and Trade (New in 2026)
- International Economic and Trade Rules (New in 2026)
- Discipline Inspection and Supervision (New in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Electronic Information Science and Technology
- Communication Engineering
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Liaoning University significantly expands its enrollment in Beijing comprehensive subjects to 23 students, with the admission ranking expected to shift backward to about 36,077, making admission significantly easier compared to 2025. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 35,577–36,577 should focus mainly on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<35,577) can focus on challenging Tier 1 flagship majors such as Law and Finance. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (about 36,577) are advised to primarily choose Tier 3 majors like Electronics and Mathematics to ensure admission.
